news.headline: Senior official from White House says they have roughly 200k Bitcoin remaining.
news.summary: The latest data reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 5.2%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. This decline represents approximately 300,000 fewer people unemployed. The number of new job openings has also surged, reaching a total of 700,000 available positions across various sectors. Additionally, the economy has experienced a growth of 4.5% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations and indicating a positive trend towards recovery. These statistics indicate a promising outlook for the labor market and overall economic stability in the nation.

news.headline: Sanoma Corporation purchased own shares on March 7th, 2025.
Former French intelligence chief convicted for illegal surveillance on journalist at LVMH's request. Bernard Squarcini faces charges for influence peddling.
news.summary: Bernard Squarcini has been convicted for orchestrating an unusual illegal surveillance scheme on a prominent journalist, ordered by a luxury company. The operation included several other criminal offenses.

news.headline: Fed's Williams: I still think the neutral rate is lower than in the 1990s.
Costco's Q4 earnings miss at $4.03 per share, below $4.11 consensus. Sales grew by 9.1%, surpassing 6.3% consensus.
news.summary: Costco Wholesale Corp (COST) saw a decrease in shares after reporting mixed fiscal Q2 results. Analysts are optimistic despite the numbers. Goldman Sachs analyst Kate McShane maintained a Buy rating, raising the price target to $1,102. COST's same-store sales, excluding gas, grew by 9.1%, surpassing the consensus of 6.3%. However, earnings of $4.03 per share fell short of the expected $4.11 per share. Core margins contracted by 8 basis points YoY due to investments in the supply chain. JPMorgan analyst Christopher Horvers reiterated an Overweight rating, raising the price target to $1,070. Earnings missed expectations due to a tax rate headwind. Overall, Costco's performance remains strong, with February sales exceeding expectations.

news.headline: VCI Global earns US$5.7M in advisory revenue from Sagtec Global Limited's Nasdaq IPO, their 3rd successful listing in a year.
news.summary: V Capital Consultancy Group achieved its third successful Nasdaq listing within a year with Sagtec Global Limited's IPO. This marks a significant milestone for the group, showcasing their strong track record and expertise in bringing companies to the public market. Sagtec Global Limited's IPO on Nasdaq highlights the growing trend of companies choosing this platform for their initial public offerings. This achievement solidifies V Capital Consultancy Group's position as a key player in the financial industry, with a total of three successful listings in the past year alone.

news.headline: Elliptic data helps US Secret Service investigate $96 billion Russian crypto exchange Garantex, enabling asset freezing.
news.summary: Elliptic, a leading provider of blockchain analytics, aided authorities in unveiling Garantex's cryptocurrency operations using their exclusive data and intelligence. This collaboration led to the identification of Garantex's wallets and subsequent freezing of assets. This breakthrough occurred in Washington on March 7, 2025.

news.headline: US Rep. Hill: Trump should work with Congress on a Bitcoin reserve.
US Energy Secretary aims to secure $20B for oil reserve replenishment plan.
Edmonton Public Schools begin rotating online learning due to strike; 6,600 support staff off since Jan 13.
news.summary: In Edmonton, Alberta, amidst a strike by CUPE Local 3550 since January 13th, Alberta schools are opting for rotating online learning as a resolution. The strike has entered its ninth week, with educational support staff demanding better wages. Edmonton Public Schools are now sending students home once or twice a week, with Michael Strembitsky school implementing a system where alternate weeks see the entire 7th and 8th grades working from home. In total, 6,600 educational support staff members are affected by the strike.

news.headline: BW Offshore received new awards under its Long-Term Incentive Programme.
Vertiv (NYSE: VRT) declares $0.0375 quarterly dividend on its Class A common stock, payable on March 27, 2025.
news.summary: Vertiv (NYSE: VRT), a leading global provider of essential digital infrastructure and resilience solutions, recently disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.0375 per share for the company's Class A common stock. Shareholders of record for the Class A common stock by the end of business on March 18, 2025, will receive the cash dividend on March 27, 2025. In addition to this, Vertiv (NYSE: VRT) integrates hardware, software, and analytics to deliver comprehensive digital infrastructure solutions.

news.headline: Slovakia construction industry to grow by 1.6% in 2025, driven by energy/infrastructure investments and residential growth.
news.summary: A recent report on the construction market in Slovakia predicts a growth rate of 1.6% in real terms for 2025. This growth is driven by investments in energy and infrastructure projects, along with a rebound in the residential sector. The report provides insights into the Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential sectors up to 2029. The data and analysis have been made available on ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: Project Rise Partners urges FCC to investigate Paramount Global and Skydance Media merger, raising important questions.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Project Rise Partners (PRP) submitted a communication to the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) asking for an examination of concerns regarding the potential merging of Paramount Global and Skydance Media. The letter highlights key queries surrounding this merger, including important considerations about competition, market concentration, and consumer impact. PRP emphasized the need for the FCC to thoroughly investigate these issues to ensure transparency and fair market practices.

news.headline: Colony Roofers expands services to Tennessee with newly acquired license, adding to its southeast presence.
news.summary: A well-known roofing company in the Southeast, Colony Roofers, has recently obtained a license to offer its top-notch services in Tennessee. This expansion marks a significant milestone for the company as it broadens its reach beyond its current locations. With a reputation for delivering high-quality roofing solutions, Colony Roofers is now set to cater to customers in the Volunteer State. This move comes as the company continues to grow and enhance its presence in the region. Established on March 7, 2025, this development signifies Colony Roofers' commitment to serving a wider customer base, with its expertise and professionalism now available in Tennessee.

news.headline: Flatiron Realty Capital secures $1 billion in credit facilities to support luxury homes, brokers, and loan originators nationwide.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Flatiron Realty Capital, LLC revealed the completion of new credit facilities amounting to $1 billion. As a prominent private equity company focusing on real estate lending, Flatiron intends to utilize these facilities to drive expansion initiatives and enhance their operations.

news.headline: Inventor creates MULTI - STAND for various items like drum sticks, pool cues & fishing poles (OCC-1748) from Garden Grove, Calif.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 7, 2025, an inventor from Garden Grove, California, discussed the creation of MULTI-STAND, a practical and portable stand capable of holding a wide range of items. The inventor stated that the multipurpose design of the stand was intended to provide drummers with a spare set of equipment readily available.

news.headline: Toll Brothers opens Charterfield Landing in Collegeville, PA with luxury homes featuring side-entry garages and basements. Sales Center at 4037 MacCormack Way now open.
news.summary: Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL), a prominent builder of luxury homes, unveiled Charterfield Landing for sale in Collegeville, Pennsylvania. This new community boasts spacious home sites with modern open-concept floor plans, side-entry garages, basements, and customizable features. The Sales Center and model home are located at 4037 MacCormack Way in Collegeville, inviting interested buyers to explore the exclusive offerings.

news.headline: Genesco Inc. (NYSE: GCO) stock falls after Q4 results: EPS misses at $3.26, sales $745.949M (1% YoY increase) vs. expected $784.85M, outlook weak for FY26.
news.summary: Genesco Inc. (NYSE:GCO) stock is down as they reported fourth-quarter adjusted earnings per share of $3.26, missing the expected $3.31. Quarterly sales totaled $745.949 million (a 1% year-over-year increase), falling short of the estimated $784.85 million. Comparable sales rose by 10%, with store sales up by 6% and e-commerce up by 18%. E-commerce sales represented 30% of retail sales, compared to 27% the previous year. Fiscal fourth quarter gross margin was 46.9%, up 60 basis points from 46.3% last year, mainly due to decreased markdowns at Journeys. The unemployment rate also rose in February, with the US economy adding fewer jobs than anticipated. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ProChile promotes Chilean pisco in Miami, Houston. Events held on Feb. 25 and 27, showcasing unique flavors.
news.summary: On February 25 and February 27, ProChile held special events in Miami and Houston to showcase Chilean pisco. Industry professionals were able to experience the country's rich heritage and distinctive flavors through immersive experiences. The events were a success in introducing the unique qualities of Chilean pisco to a select audience.

news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group offers strategies for IT leaders to manage rising costs from tariffs. A new report provides guidance for cost optimization.
news.summary: A recent report from a prominent global research and advisory firm offers valuable insights for IT leaders grappling with escalating expenses brought on by changing tariff policies. The report provides proactive cost optimization strategies to address this issue, equipping IT departments with actionable guidance to effectively navigate financial uncertainties.

news.headline: Hilco Real Estate Sales is selling two office buildings in Oak Brook, IL & Southfield, MI, with a bid deadline of April 16, 2025, and auction date of April 23, 2025.
news.summary: In Northbrook, Illinois, on March 7, 2025, Hilco Real Estate Sales revealed that the deadline for qualifying bids for the sale of two prominent office buildings in Oak Brook, IL, and Southfield, MI, is set for April 16, 2025, with an auction scheduled for April 23, 2025. The properties are expected to attract significant attention due to their prime locations and potential for development and investment opportunities. Interested parties are urged to submit their bids by the specified date for a chance to acquire these highly visible assets.

news.headline: Brickworks N.A. opens new Chicago location offering high-quality products, guidance, and collaborative spaces.
news.summary: The latest Supply Center, launched by Brickworks North America (Brickworks N.A.) in Chicago on March 7, 2025, offers a diverse range of high-quality products, along with expert advice and shared workspaces. The facility aims to provide a comprehensive solution for all masonry needs. As the parent company of Glen-Gery, Brickworks N.A. is focused on enhancing the customer experience. This new establishment is set to cater to a wide audience, ensuring accessibility to top-notch supplies and fostering a collaborative environment.

news.headline: Slovenia construction industry expected to grow by 2.6% in 2025; forecasted to maintain 2.7% annual growth until 2029.
news.summary: A report on the Slovenia Construction Market reveals that the construction industry in the country is projected to grow by 2.6% in 2025 in real terms. Following this, there is an expected average annual growth rate of 2.7% from 2026 to 2029, driven by investments in sectors such as transport, renewable energy, and manufacturing. The report covers various sectors including commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets. The information is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: V&V Supremo Foods, Inc. wins big at 2025 US Championship Cheese Contest for excellence in Mexican cheese.
news.summary: Latin American cheesemaker V&V Supremo Foods, Inc., known for its authentic Mexican cheese and dairy products, has been acknowledged for its excellence in the industry. At the 2025 event in Chicago on March 7, they secured numerous top awards, further establishing their leading position in the market. This recognition highlights their commitment to quality and innovation within their products.

news.headline: Gender diversity on corporate boards stagnating - Equilar study shows only 0.60 GDI in Q4 2024, with low new board seats for women. #InternationalWomensDay
news.summary: In recognition of International Women’s Day on March 8, Redwood City, Calif. reports a concerning state of gender diversity on corporate boards. According to Equilar’s Q4 2024 Gender Diversity Index (GDI), the current GDI stands at 0.60, unchanged for the third consecutive quarter. This underscores a lack of progress towards gender parity across the Russell 3000. A GDI of 1.0 signifies equal representation of both genders on corporate boards. The halt in female representation growth on boards signifies a pressing issue that needs attention.

news.headline: Unit revenue shows ongoing growth, reaching record levels surpassing $1 billion this quarter.
Cadillac F1 team gets go-ahead from FIA to join Formula One, backed by TWG Motorsports and GM.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Indianapolis and Silverstone, England, it was announced that the Cadillac Formula 1 Team has been granted approval to join the prestigious FIA Formula One World Championship. The team, supported by TWG Motorsports and General Motors (GM), will be entering the pinnacle of motorsport with their entry onto the grid.

news.headline: Music of Your Life, a TMGI subsidiary, launches syndicated radio program focusing on cancer awareness.
news.summary: A syndicated radio program has been launched by Music of Your Life, a subsidiary of TMGI. The company is emphasizing its commitment to cancer awareness with this new venture. The radio program will be broadcast across multiple stations, reaching a large audience. This move comes as part of TMGI's initiative to raise awareness about cancer, a cause they have been actively supporting. The program aims to spread awareness and educate the public about the importance of cancer prevention and early detection. This new platform will enable the company to reach a wider demographic and provide valuable information on cancer-related issues.

news.headline: Lottery.com Inc. complies with Nasdaq's rules after share price rises above $1 for 20 days, no reverse split needed.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas, on March 07, 2025, Lottery.com Inc. (NASDAQ: LTRY; LTRYW) received a notice from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC stating that the Company has met the Minimum Bid Price Requirement under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5450(a)(1). This compliance was achieved as the closing bid price of the Company's common share was $1.00 or above for the last consecutive twenty business days. It is important to highlight that Lottery.com regained compliance without needing to carry out a reverse stock split.

news.headline: BioNexus Gene Lab Corp partners with ML Tech to enhance Ethereum-focused treasury strategy, emphasizing innovation and financial growth.
news.summary: Tech company BioNexus Gene Lab Corp. (NASDAQ: BGLC) from Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, has recently partnered with AI-driven wealth management platform ML Tech, based in Miami, Florida. The goal of this collaboration is to enhance BioNexus Gene Lab Corp.'s growth strategies, particularly those based on Ethereum. The National Futures Association (NFA) regulates ML Tech. This partnership comes in the wake of BioNexus Gene Lab Corp. unveiling its Ethereum treasury strategy, showcasing its dedication to technological and financial advancement.

news.headline: IDBS introduces Polar Control to enhance BioPharma process management, a milestone in improving operational efficiency.
news.summary: In Woking, located in the United Kingdom, on March 7, 2025, a prominent company called IDBS, known for offering cloud software solutions to BioPharma firms worldwide, unveiled a new product called IDBS Polar Control. This innovative module is part of the Polar platform and aims to revolutionize process management in the industry.

news.headline: SMArtX Advisory Solutions adds 5 new strategies from leading asset firms, including Vulcan Value Partners, to its platform.
news.summary: Vulcan Value Partners has recently partnered with the SMArtX Platform in West Palm Beach, Florida. The collaboration, announced on March 7, 2025, includes the integration of 5 new strategies offered by five prominent asset management firms. SMArtX, known for its advancements in managed accounts technology, continues to expand its offerings through this new addition.

news.headline: Compal and APAL reveal Hestia NTN IoT Dongle at Satellite 2025; U.S. launch on Amazon by March.CharacterSetCount: 88
news.summary: Compal Electronics (Stock Ticker: 2324.TW) will be unveiling their newest NTN IoT technology and its various applications at Satellite 2025, a top global satellite industry event, happening from March 10 to 13, 2025. The showcase will be part of a collaboration with APAL during the event, where attendees can explore the cutting-edge technology and its potential uses.

news.headline: Inventor from Buena Park invents NELO emergency lighting system for police cars, aimed at modernizing and improving capabilities.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 7, 2025, an inventor from Buena Park, California shared their innovation to enhance emergency lighting for police vehicles. The inventor introduced NELO, designed to provide high visibility for officers while allowing a stealthy approach. This invention reflects the inventor's goal to modernize and improve emergency lighting for police cars, outlining a significant development in law enforcement technology.

news.headline: Dumb Friends League rebrands after 115 years as Humane Colorado, a national leader in animal welfare.
news.summary: Humane Colorado, previously known as the Dumb Friends League, has rebranded after 115 years of providing compassionate animal welfare services. The organization, based in Denver, announced the new name as part of its efforts to continue leading in national animal welfare initiatives. This change comes as the organization aims to further its impact and reach in aiding animals in need.

news.headline: Red Canary's fiscal year 2025 saw rapid enterprise growth, faster threat investigation 10x on average, showcasing innovative products.
news.summary: The swift integration of identity and cloud security measures has led to increased customer satisfaction and boosted company expansion. With the help of AI-driven workflows, security teams are able to analyze threats at a rate that is 10 times quicker than before. This enhancement in speed has resulted in improved efficiency and better security results. The developments took place in Denver on March 7, 2025.

news.headline: Dr. Aja McCutchen of United Digestive receives 2025 Rosenthal Award for Volunteer Leadership from Crohn's & Colitis Foundation.
news.summary: Recognizing remarkable efforts in enhancing the quality of life for individuals impacted by inflammatory bowel disease, Dr. Aja McCutchen from United Digestive has been honored with the 2025 Rosenthal Award for Volunteer Leadership by the Crohn's & Colitis organization in Atlanta. The prestigious award is a testament to Dr. McCutchen's dedication and commitment to making a positive impact on those affected by the condition. This acknowledgment highlights her significant contributions, showcasing exemplary volunteerism in the field. The award serves as a symbol of appreciation for Dr. McCutchen's outstanding work in advancing support and care for individuals dealing with inflammatory bowel disease.

news.headline: UMOCA will host NCECA's 3 key exhibitions for 2025 Conference in Salt Lake City on March 26-29.
news.summary: In Salt Lake City on March 7, 2025, the Utah Museum of Contemporary Art (UMOCA) announced it would showcase the National Council on Education for the Ceramic Arts' (NCECA) three main exhibitions at the 2025 NCECA Annual Conference, Formation, from March 26-29, 2025.
